title: Assigning a team without needing full board access
excerpt: I want to be able to assign a team in a People column so that they receive automated email updates about certain changes that take place on items they are tagged in but I don’t want then to have access to the board itsel…

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to be able to assign a team in a People column so that they receive automated email updates about certain changes that take place on items they are tagged in but I don’t want then to have access to the board itself.
As I see it right now any teams that do not have workspace access do not appear in the selection list of teams that can be added to a people column.

posts.author: Clover_Gal (Desiree McCarthy | monday.com Ambassador)
posts.cookedHtml: Can you instead create an automation that sends an email to a ‘distro’ email when the status changes?

posts.author: AndrewJones (Andrew Jones)
posts.cookedHtml: I could but I only want to send the notification for items that would be tagged to the interest of this specific team. I was hoping to be able to use the Team as defined in Monday to both tag the items and as the distribution set of emails.
